description: Execute Python scripts in the editor

functions.name: IsPythonInitialized
functions.description: Check to see whether Python has been initialized and is ready to use.

functions.name: IsPythonConfigured
functions.description: Check to see whether Python has been configured.

functions.name: IsPythonAvailable
functions.description: Check to see whether Python support is available in the current environment.

functions.name: ForceEnablePythonAtRuntime
functions.description: Force Python to be enabled and initialized, regardless of the settings that control its default enabled state.

functions.name: ExecutePythonScript
functions.description: Execute a Python script with argument marshaling.
